description_long: This apartment building features a modern, rectangular design with three visible stories and a flat roof. The facade is primarily composed of light brown brickwork, accented by a dark gray vertical section and large glass windows. The building includes multiple balconies and terraces, some with outdoor furniture and lush greenery, enhancing its residential appeal. The ground level opens onto a landscaped garden area with trees, shrubs, and a fenced perimeter, providing a private outdoor space. Windows are symmetrically arranged, and the main entrance is located on the darker facade section. The overall structure is robust, with clean lines and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A three-story modern apartment building with brick and dark gray accents, large windows, balconies, and landscaped outdoor areas.
description_view_0: This view highlights the building's terraces, balconies, and lush garden area with visible outdoor furniture and greenery.
description_view_1: This view shows the flat facade with symmetrically arranged windows and the main entrance in the dark gray section.
description_view_2: This side view displays the building's length, additional windows, and the continuation of the garden and balcony features.
description_view_3: This view emphasizes the garden frontage, multiple balconies, and the integration of greenery with the building's design.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical and horizontal rows, with consistent spacing and alignment across all visible facades.
